10530457.title: My Paranormal Nightmare
10530457.description: Ghost hunters share the stories that led them to a career in the paranormal. A woman claims she used to experience nightly visits from a horned demon.

10541455.title: My Paranormal Nightmare
10541455.description: A father and son come face-to-face with what they believe is the ghost of a screaming girl. Plus, a teenager claims to hear the whispers of sinister spirits.

10561475.title: My Paranormal Nightmare
10561475.description: A father and son come face-to-face with what they believe is the ghost of a screaming girl. Plus, a teenager claims to hear the whispers of sinister spirits.

10606551.title: My Paranormal Nightmare
10606551.description: A brother and sister believe they have been chased by a shadow figure. Plus, a family report ghostly whispers and mournful serenades in their new home.

10611448.title: My Paranormal Nightmare
10611448.description: A brother and sister believe they have been chased by a shadow figure. Plus, a family report ghostly whispers and mournful serenades in their new home.

10551842.title: My Paranormal Nightmare
10551842.description: People share their experiences with destructive spirits. A young girl fears a poltergeist and a boy claims to be terrorised by a shadow man.
